commands.benchmark: env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model <model> --fixture <fixture> --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --c1-baseline-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-05-hipengine-qwen35-c2-c1-serial-baseline-refresh-285/c1-baseline-scaling.json --serial-bridge-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-05-hipengine-qwen35-c8-serial-baseline-refresh-287/c8-serial-bridge-scaling.json --primitive-correctness-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-04-hipengine-qwen35-retained-c248-primitive-gpu-correctness-261/primitive-c8.json --profiler-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-05-hipengine-qwen35-c8-default256-baseline-348/profiler-c8-retained.json --profiler-command <iter347 rocprof command> --json /tmp/hipengine-iter348-c8-current-baseline-profiler-retained/c8-default256-with-baselines-profiler.json
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json

conclusion: Current no-flag c8 default256 loaded c1 and serial-bridge baselines, primitive c8 correctness, and retained-gate-shaped profiler evidence while preserving generated-token equality [137]*8. Scaling references are complete (aggregate_vs_c1 > 1 and aggregate_vs_serial_bridge > 1), but c8 remains blocked/non-retained because rowchunked full attention keeps native_caware_decode=false and because the profiler command was captured from the no-baseline current default smoke rather than this exact retained-attachment command. This is required runtime evidence only; no retained throughput/scaling claim is made.

blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path

c8_default256_with_baselines_profiler.decision_reason: batch_execution.throughput_claim_eligible=false; artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; profiler artifact must include command or profiler_command; profiler command must start with rocprofv3; profiler command device env prefix must match retained command; profiler command --profiler-json must match profiler.artifact_path; profiler command --json must match retained artifact path; profiler command --c1-baseline-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --serial-bridge-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --primitive-correctness-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-mode must match retained sampler mode; profiler command must include --batch-sample-eq-ok; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-artifact must match retained sampler equality artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-rows must match retained sampler equality rows; execution.batch_execution.blockers must be empty; execution.batch_execution.row_execution must not contain serial or fallback; execution.batch_execution.native_caware_decode must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.full_attention_decode_path must be native_batch;
